title: Council Critic Output Schema
description: Schema for a single council critic's output. Used by the council orchestrator to detect malformed responses so it can enforce the retry cap (retry up to N times, then outcome=DROPPED).

thought.description: Private reasoning scratchpad. Not shown to the user or surfaced in output. Use to plan the critique, note contradictions, and reason before committing to findings. Leave empty if no pre-reasoning is needed.

seat.description: Critic seat id. Each seat is an independent critic, ideally from a different model family.

path.description: Which path of the dual-path council this output belongs to.

outcome.description: Per-seat outcome tag. Only DROPPED counts as a degraded seat.

findings.description: Zero-or-more critique findings. An empty array is valid when outcome is ABSTAINED.

claim.description: The defect or concern, stated as a complete sentence.

rationale.description: Why this is a defect. Citations or references preferred.

patch_direction.description: Concrete suggested edit direction (not necessarily exact text).

spec_location.description: Optional: a criterion id or section name from the spec body.

citations.description: Optional source attribution. Backward compatible: absent on legacy findings. Each entry grounds the finding in a spec or decision doc.

doc.description: Document identifier: title or index of the cited spec/decision doc.

anchor.description: Quoted anchor text from the doc. Keep short (15 words or fewer) for models without a native citations API.

span.description: Optional location: a section ref (e.g. R2) or a char range (e.g. 80-152).

duration_s.description: Wall-clock duration of the critic call in seconds.

tokens_out.description: Output token count for cost accounting.
